_comment: Ready-to-paste Claude Desktop MCP server entry for PalLLM. Merge the 'mcpServers' block into your existing claude_desktop_config.json. Path on Windows: %APPDATA%/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json -- on macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json -- on Linux: ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json. Restart Claude Desktop after saving.
_comment_auth: If PalLLM is running with PalLLM:Auth:ApiKey set, add an 'Authorization' entry under 'headers': { "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR-KEY-HERE" }. Otherwise omit the headers block.
_comment_remote: For a PalLLM running on another machine, replace localhost with the host's IP or hostname. Always pair remote deployments with PalLLM:Auth:ApiKey + TLS via a reverse proxy.
